name: AGIS Pixel Game Asset Library
visualStyle: dark navy, brass and gold fantasy-steampunk pixel art with role-based glow accents

characters.title: Pixel Character Sprite Sheet
characters.description: Ten AGIS heroes with front, side, back and signature action poses.

equipment.title: Equipment & Props Sheet
equipment.description: Role-specific equipment for all ten heroes plus reusable generic props.

tileset.title: Tileset & Environment Sheet
tileset.description: Top-down floors, walls, doors, props, VFX tiles and ten themed rooms.

worldMap.title: AGIS World Map Sheet
worldMap.description: Overworld, hub, mission and tactical minimap references for the AGIS realms.

productionNotes: These sheets are visual references and preview atlases, not final animation-ready sprite strips.
Slice final assets into fixed grid cells and define a stable pivot or anchor point before game integration.
Use nearest-neighbor scaling and disable image smoothing for crisp pixel rendering.
Review small generated labels before using them as authoritative in-game text.
